economic_notes: Nation holds investments in Quatsino Economic Development Limited Partnership, Quatsino First Nation Economic Development Corporation Ltd., Gwabalis Fisheries Society, and Gilakasla Kwa Holdings Ltd. Business entities include Quatsino Marine Limited Partnership, Quattishe Limited Partnership, Quatern Limited Partnership, 688357 B.C. Ltd., Quatsino Marine GP Ltd., and Quattishe Forest Products Ltd.
notes: Audit is qualified due to unaudited financial statements of Quatern Limited Partnership, preventing sufficient audit evidence for investment in Nation business entities and share of earnings. One-time item: forgiveness of treaty loan of $2,336,668. CMHC Housing is the only consolidated subsidiary; Quatsino Economic Development Limited Partnership, Quatsino First Nation Economic Development Corporation Ltd., Gwabalis Fisheries Society, and Gilakasla Kwa Holdings Ltd. are accounted for under the modified equity method. Transfer to Nation Members of $578,500 and prior year transfer to Quatsino Economic Development Limited Partnership of $1,900,000 are recorded. expenses_housing includes Housing ($63,675) and Social Housing CMHC ($371,737). total_government_transfers includes ISC ($2,942,683), FNHA ($1,314,877), CMHC ($198,611), DFO ($168,450), Province of BC ($737230), NVIAIMS ($37,710), FNESC ($428,237), First Nation organizations ($15,000) less trust funds excluded as not government transfer = approximately $5,843,798 but trust funds ($19,811) excluded; total calculated as ISC+FNHA+CMHC+DFO+ProvinceBC+NVIAIMS+FNESC+FNOrgs = 5843798. osr recalculated accordingly.
